author: ayanouta
description: A Firthian collocation explorer grounded in corpus linguistics. Extracts habitual lexical patterns from your vault using sliding-window co-occurrence, PMI, and log-likelihood, then surfaces them as an interactive word sphere with KWIC concordance views. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ayano7an
manifest.description: Firthian collocation explorer grounded in corpus linguistics. Extracts lexical patterns via sliding-window co-occurrence, PMI, and log-likelihood. Renders collocates as an interactive word sphere with KWIC concordance views.
manifest.name: Keyword in Context

name: Keyword in Context

releases.author: Ayano7an
releases.description: # Keyword in Context within your vault 1. Spheral visualization of your habitual lexical usage pattern. 3. Interact and see how specific keyword companioned by co-occurrent words.
